channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Karachi police apprehend female suspect involved in narcotics distribution
item.description: KARACHI: In a joint operation conducted by Garden Police Station and a civilian intelligence agency, Karachi police successfully arrested Anmol, also known as Pinki, a woman identified as a major supp...

item.title: Trump Organization’s Tbilisi Tower Project Raises Concerns Over Partners’ Alleged Russian Links
item.description: The Trump Organization is moving forward with an international real estate project, Trump Tower Tbilisi, a planned 70-story luxury apartment building in Georgia that would become the tallest structure...

item.title: India’s Role in Ghana’s Government Buildings Reflects Diplomatic and Cultural Ties
item.description: Ghana’s most prominent public buildings, including the National Mosque in Accra and Jubilee House—the seat of the government—highlight how architecture is a reflection of both local identity and inter...

item.title: Sen. Shaheen challenges Defense Secretary Hegseth over Iran conflict progress and sanctions policy in Senate hearing
item.description: During a Senate Appropriations Committee hearing on Tuesday, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced sharp questioning from Senator Jeanne Shaheen regarding the ongoing conflict involving Iran and broade...

item.title: KP CM Afridi participates in sit-in with Imran Khan's sisters outside Adiala Jail amid security restrictions
item.description: On Tuesday, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi joined a sit-in with the sisters of former Prime Minister Imran Khan near Adiala Jail in Rawalpindi. This demonstration took place as Khan c...

item.title: Katharine Hepburn's Childhood: Family, Activism, and Early Tragedy
item.description: Katharine Hepburn, born May 12, 1907, in Hartford, Connecticut, grew up in a progressive and intellectually vibrant upper-middle-class family that shaped her independent and strong-willed personality....

item.title: Cannes Film Festival Jury Members Share Their Experiences
item.description: The Cannes Film Festival has long been a prestigious event in the global film industry, and being invited to serve on its jury is a unique honour. This year, the jury is led by South Korean director P...

item.title: ANC Youth League says convicted leaders should not call for Ramaphosa’s resignation
item.description: ANC Youth League president Collen Malatji has stated that leaders of political parties with criminal convictions, such as EFF leader Julius Malema and former president Jacob Zuma, have no authority to...

item.title: Labour leadership speculation intensifies amid internal party debate
item.description: The Labour Party is experiencing a period of internal turmoil, with speculation mounting over Keir Starmer’s future as leader. Recent commentary has highlighted the perceived ineffectiveness of severa...

item.title: Police Arrest Suspects Linked to Car Parts Theft Caught on Viral Parklands Video
item.description: Police in Nairobi have arrested several suspects nabbed in connection with a brazen car parts theft captured in a viral video from Parklands estate. The incident, which spread like wildfire across soc...

item.title: Gunmen abduct 60‑year‑old building materials trader in Monatan, Oyo
item.description: Unknown gunmen have abducted a 60‑year‑old building materials trader in the Monatan community of Ibadan, Oyo State. The man was reportedly on his way home along the Jinarere axis of Alakia Road when f...

item.title: Infinix Launches XBOOK B14 Laptop in the Philippines with Ryzen 7 and 14-inch Display
item.description: Infinix has officially launched its latest laptop, the XBOOK B14, in the Philippines. The device features a 14-inch IPS LCD display with a resolution of 1920 x 1200 pixels and a 16:10 aspect ratio, pr...

item.title: Mothers of Drug War Victims Challenge Senator Bato Dela Rosa Amid ICC Arrest Warrant
item.description: Families of victims from the Duterte administration's war on drugs have strongly challenged Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa to face his alleged sins following the International Criminal Court's confir...

item.title: Police Face Inquiry for Allowing High-Profile Drug Suspect in Court Without Handcuffs
item.description: KARACHI: Police in Karachi came under scrutiny after a high-profile female drug suspect, Anmol alias Pinky, was brought to a judicial magistrate without handcuffs, violating standard operating procedu...

item.title: Epstein survivor criticizes DOJ handling of file redactions during House Oversight Committee testimony
item.description: During a House Oversight Committee hearing held in Palm Beach, Florida, a survivor of Jeffrey Epstein delivered emotional testimony criticizing the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for what she descri...

item.title: Trump Administration's 2026 Counterterrorism Strategy Targets Violent Secular Political Groups and Antifa
item.description: The Trump administration released its 2026 U.S. Counterterrorism Strategy, emphasizing a focus on domestic threats alongside traditional ones like cartels and Islamist terror groups. The document prio...

item.title: Saccawu accuses Pick n Pay of bad faith in section 189A process threatening 22 000 jobs
item.description: The South African Commercial Catering and Allied Workers Union (Saccawu) has strongly criticised Pick n Pay following the retailer’s decision to initiate a section 189A retrenchment process. According...

item.title: Wedge Pillow Can Help Improve Sleep, Sinus Relief, and Recovery
item.description: Sleep issues such as sleep apnea, snoring, acid reflux, and post-surgery discomfort can severely affect rest. Medical experts recommend elevating the head during sleep to improve airflow and reduce di...

item.title: BABYMONSTER Focuses on Music and World Tour Over Brand Collaborations
item.description: BABYMONSTER, a rising K-pop girl group under YG Entertainment, has chosen to temporarily decline multiple offers from global luxury brands. This decision aligns with the philosophy of YG Entertainment...

item.title: Australian Gothic aesthetics and dark romantic fashion define emerging designers at Australian Fashion Week
item.description: A new wave of emerging Australian designers showcased a distinctly dark and gothic-inspired direction at Australian Fashion Week, signalling a shift away from the country’s traditional emphasis on bri...
